evidence.summary: Settings tests keep agent/skill/plugin tabs available around the workflow tab addition.
Diagnostics tab tests confirm other settings surfaces still load through Settings after tab expansion.
General settings tests assert tab ordering includes Workflows and H5 Access alongside existing tabs.
quotes_or_symbols: moves H5 access out of General into its own Settings tab

evidence.summary: MCP tests verify current workdir-aware fetch/toggle behavior in the expanded settings shell.
Memory settings tests confirm pending path routing and file opening through shared settings navigation.
Plugin tab tests confirm plugin detail navigation continues to coexist with shared settings tabs.
Skills tab tests confirm the skills browser and detail view still route through Settings.
API tests lock workflow template, transition, report, and linked-start endpoint contracts used by desktop workflow UI.
Desktop API client exposes workflow template CRUD/import/export plus workflow state, transition, and report routes.
Workflow component tests cover manager, picker, start dialog, status panel, transition controls, report link, and localization.
Workflow barrel re-exports the picker, status panel, report link, transition controls, and related public types.
Import/export dialog previews payloads before commit and exports selected templates through sessionsApi.
Completed workflow sessions render a durable report pointer only when reportPointer and completed status exist.
Start dialog sorts templates, disables non-startable entries, shows invalid diagnostics, and returns template id/source/initial phase on start.
Status panel renders workflow lifecycle, phase progress, model fallback info, state pointers, and read-only artifact history.
Template editor converts between UI draft state and workflow template drafts, validates required fields, and server-validates before save.
Template manager is the settings-hosted workflow admin surface for list, edit, delete, duplicate, import, export, and refresh.
Template picker shows only startable templates, tracks explicit selection, and surfaces invalid-template messages separately.
Transition controls emit confirm/reject/retry/manual_complete commands keyed by phaseId, transitionId, and stateVersion.
Builtin workflow names, descriptions, and phase labels are localized with fallback to server-provided text.
Provider settings helper tests confirm settings JSON masking and restoration for secrets.
Settings JSON helper strips provider-managed env keys and masks API secrets used by settings pages.
Activity page tests confirm expanded settings shell still renders other tab content and hover UI.
Activity settings page is an adjacent tab with heatmap and summary metrics, not part of workflow execution.
Adapter page tests verify Feishu onboarding content survives alongside workflow tab changes.
Adapter settings is an adjacent IM integration page with pairing and per-platform forms.
Computer use tests verify independent config writes within the same settings shell.
Computer use page is an adjacent settings surface for environment checks and app authorization.
Diagnostics page is another settings tab with status, bundle export, and Doctor actions.
EmptySession tests pin workflow launch UX: plus-menu entry, start dialog rendering, startable filtering, invalid-template diagnostics, and workflow session creation payloads.
quotes_or_symbols: opens workflows from the plus menu

evidence.summary: EmptySession loads workflow templates on mount, opens WorkflowStartDialog from composer tools, and creates sessions with workflow options via useSessionStore.createSession.
MCP page is an adjacent settings surface for server list/detail/editor flows.
Memory page is an adjacent settings surface with resource tree, editor, and preview panes.
Settings tests explicitly verify the Workflows tab, its heading/description, and pendingSettingsTab routing.
Settings shell declares a dedicated 'workflows' tab and renders WorkflowsSettings with WorkflowTemplateManager between H5 Access and Adapters.
Terminal tests show terminal preferences coexist with the broader settings shell.
Terminal page is an adjacent settings surface for embedded shell sessions and Windows shell preferences.
uiStore tests cover theme handling around the same navigation store that carries pendingSettingsTab.
uiStore defines the 'workflows' SettingsTab option plus pendingSettingsTab used for cross-view navigation into the Workflows tab.
Shared session types define workflow lifecycle, template list/detail/import/export contracts, transition requests, and workflow session summaries used across the desktop UI.

observations.summary: Workflow entry is opt-in from EmptySession. Default dialogue creation remains unchanged until the user opens the Workflows tool and explicitly selects a template.
Workflow template administration is isolated under a dedicated Settings tab and does not reuse the general/H5 settings sections.
Template editing is server-validated before mutation: the editor runs local required-field checks, then calls sessionsApi.validateWorkflowTemplate before create/update.
Invalid workflow templates are intentionally visible as diagnostics in both launch and management surfaces, but they are not rendered as startable/selectable workflow buttons.
Runtime workflow UI is split between read-only status/history rendering and command emission; transition controls emit structured commands rather than mutating workflow artifacts locally.
Navigation into the Workflows tab is store-driven through uiStore.pendingSettingsTab, allowing slash-command or other surfaces to route users directly into workflow settings.
Workflow API surface is centralized in sessionsApi and typed through desktop/src/types/session.ts, including template import/export, linked-start, report retrieval, and transition request contracts.
